svg.text: Bureau of Investigation — Internal Design Archive
Design Philosophy: Modular drone-launch platform / EH Chamber centered / Long-range doctrine

g.text: Color: Dark steel-blue / EH chamber: center dome / Drone bays: wing pods
Armament: EH wave emitter (bow) / CWEH shield / 480 drones
EH chamber dominates hull / No drones / High stealth

svg.text: Design Philosophy: RIDE armor / No drones — all human crew / Self-warp capable / Dense formation

g.text: Color: Dark gunmetal (RIDE) / Energy discharge: absolute black / Dying: ash-white
Armament: Penetration beam (bow) / Incineration wave (top turrets) / Hull cannon
30% larger than equivalent Council vessel / All-RIDE armor / 15,000 crew / No AI

svg.text: Design Philosophy: Modified civilian / Guerrilla doctrine / Named individually / Needle-class stealth

g.text: Color: Irregular matte dark green-grey / Asymmetric modifications / Individually named
Mobile shipyard / Repair + resupply / Irregular composite structure
Bulkier than military vessels / Modified civilian origin

svg.text: V. SIZE COMPARISON — 함급 크기 비교
Council — Dark steel-blue composite / EH glow: blue-violet
Neka (normal) — Dark gunmetal RIDE / "Frozen night sky" grain visible
Liberation Alliance — Irregular matte dark green-grey / Asymmetric patching
Logistics — Neutral dark grey / Modular block structure
⚠ Items marked "Inferred" have no explicit exterior description in source — designed consistent with established lore
